name: parking-management-system-workspace
description: Root workspace of the Parking Management System containing frontend and backend components

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && uv venv --clear && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 5000
